---
title: "Penguin Bills"
format: dashboard
server: shiny
---

# Main page

```{python}
import seaborn as sns
penguins = sns.load_dataset("penguins")
from shiny.express import render, ui
from quarto import render as quarto_render
```

## {.sidebar}

```{python}
ui.input_select("x", "Variable:",
                choices=["bill_length_mm", "bill_depth_mm"])
ui.input_select("dist", "Distribution:", choices=["hist", "kde"])
ui.input_checkbox("rug", "Show rug marks", value = False)
```

Want a PDF report based on your selection?

```{python}
# get a temporary file name, render the report and return the temp file
@render.download(filename="report.pdf", label="Download a custom report!")
def custom_report():
    quarto_render(
        'report.qmd',
        execute_params = {
          "x": input.x(),
          "kind": input.dist()
        }
      )
    return 'report.pdf'
```

## Column

```{python}
@render.plot
def displot():
    sns.displot(
        data=penguins, hue="species", multiple="stack",
        x=input.x(), rug=input.rug(), kind=input.dist())
```



# About

Some more static content goes here!

If it's really long, we can split it off into other files:

{{< include _otherpage.qmd >}}
